task_completion.description: Column E (Next Due Date) is populated with calculated dates for the pet vaccination records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Column E in the spreadsheet. It should contain dates that represent the next due date for each vaccine.

task_completion.description: Column F (Status) is populated with status indicators (e.g., 'Overdue', 'Current', 'Valid') for the pet vaccination records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Column F in the spreadsheet. It should contain text indicating the current status of the vaccine.

task_completion.description: Formulas were used to calculate the Next Due Date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the formula bar when a cell in Column E is selected. It should show a formula (e.g., adding the booster interval to the vaccination date) rather than a hardcoded date.

task_completion.description: Formulas were used to calculate the Status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the formula bar when a cell in Column F is selected. It should show a formula (e.g., an IF statement comparing the due date to the current date) rather than hardcoded text.

task_completion.description: Conditional formatting is applied to highlight overdue vaccines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the cells indicating an 'Overdue' status. They should be visually highlighted (e.g., red background color, bold red text) distinct from non-overdue cells.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a graphical spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) rather than using terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a spreadsheet application interface open with the data loaded.

integrity.description: The agent is modifying the actual pet vaccination records file provided in the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet should contain records for pets named Max, Bella, and Whiskers, and vaccines like Rabies, DHPP, Bordetella, and FVRCP.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply open the CSV/file in a plain text editor to manually type in the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen should show a spreadsheet GUI with a formula bar, not a basic text editor like Nano, Vim, or Gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 8 vaccination records for 3 pets (Max, Bella, Whiskers) and 4 vaccine types. Column E must calculate Next Due Date (Vaccination Date + Booster Interval). Column F must calculate Status. As of the system date (2026-03-07), 6 out of 8 vaccines are overdue. Overdue cells must be visually highlighted using conditional formatting.
